name: Glade Cyber Lodge Arcade Render
description: Render cozy cyber lodge arcade with agents playing games
code: (function(){var c=drawingContext,w=dimensionContext.width,h=dimensionContext.height,t=state.t||0;c.fillStyle='rgba(6,8,14,1)';c.fillRect(0,0,w,h);var g=c.createLinearGradient(0,h*0.2,0,h);g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(18,26,40,1)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(10,8,6,1)');c.fillStyle=g;c.fillRect(0,0,w,h);c.fillStyle='rgba(40,22,12,1)';c.fillRect(0,h*0.65,w,h*0.35);c.fillStyle='rgba(26,16,8,1)';for(var i=0;i<12;i++){var px=(i*97)%w; c.fillRect(px,h*0.65,46,h*0.35);}c.save();c.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.12)';for(var j=0;j<90;j++){var sx=(j*71)%w,sy=(j*43)% (h*0.6);c.fillRect(sx,sy,1,1);}c.restore();var screens=state.screens||[];for(var k=0;k<screens.length;k++){var scn=screens[k];c.save();c.translate(scn.x,scn.y);c.fillStyle='rgba(10,6,4,1)';c.fillRect(-70,-40,140,120);c.fillStyle='rgba(6,4,10,1)';c.fillRect(-60,-30,120,70);var pulse=0.4+0.6*(0.5+0.5*Math.sin(t*0.08+k));if(scn.game==='FLAP'){c.fillStyle='rgba(120,220,255,'+pulse.toFixed(2)+')';c.beginPath();c.moveTo(-40,10);c.lineTo(-10,-10);c.lineTo(10,0);c.lineTo(0,16);c.closePath();c.fill();}else{c.strokeStyle='rgba(255,220,140,'+pulse.toFixed(2)+')';c.lineWidth=3;c.strokeRect(-32,-4,24,24);c.strokeRect(8,6,24,24);}c.fillStyle='rgba(120,255,220,0.9)';c.fillRect(-18,50,36,6);c.restore();}var agents=state.agents||[];for(var a=0;a<agents.length;a++){var ag=agents[a];c.save();c.translate(ag.x,ag.y);c.fillStyle='rgba(40,20,12,1)';c.beginPath();c.ellipse(0,10,20,14,0,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();c.beginPath();c.ellipse(0,-6,14,12,0,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();c.fillStyle='rgba(245,240,230,1)';c.beginPath();c.ellipse(-4,-8,3,4,0,0,Math.PI*2);c.ellipse(4,-8,3,4,0,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();c.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.9)';c.beginPath();c.arc(-4,-8,1.3,0,Math.PI*2);c.arc(4,-8,1.3,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();c.strokeStyle='rgba(245,220,200,0.9)';c.lineWidth=1.6;c.beginPath();c.arc(0,-4,4,0,Math.PI);c.stroke();c.fillStyle='rgba(120,255,220,0.9)';c.font='12px monospace';c.textAlign='center';c.fillText(ag.skin,0,16);c.restore();}c.save();c.globalCompositeOperation='screen';for(var q=0;q<18;q++){var lx=(q*137)%w,ly=h*0.45+Math.sin(t*0.04+q)*20;var r=4+(q%3)*3;var cg=c.createRadialGradient(lx,ly,0,lx,ly,r);cg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(160,255,220,0.85)');cg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(160,255,220,0)');c.fillStyle=cg;c.beginPath();c.arc(lx,ly,r,0,Math.PI*2);c.fill();}c.restore();})();
